Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}Chicken tenderloin, eggs, broccoli... We're gonna boil 'em one after the other.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}This is a staple for an athlete. Full of valuable nutrients, and not too hard to cook, either.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}The problem is what comes after.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Next you gotta portion everything out, and then put it in the freezer. It's a lot of work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 1 25 25}Not really. I'm just lazy, so I want to do everything in one go.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}But if I want to get stronger, I have to do whatever it takes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}Well hey, can't just eat it all at once. Your body needs some time between meals.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}The human body needs a lot. You just gotta learn to deal with it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Getting all of your protein from supplements isn't really realistic.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Plus, protein powder is expensive and food gives you other nutrients, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}That really went by fast. The work is so much more efficient with two of us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Here, you take some, too. It's perfect for a midnight snack, since it won't really put on fat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}I know your diet is important for building a strong body, but I'll admit, I'm not much of a cook.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 1 25 25}I could use your help again sometime, if you don't mind. I might be able to try something more elaborate with your help.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Maybe I should buy some pig's feet. I hear they're rich in collagen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}I recently expanded my outdoor exercise regimen, and I wanted to boost my nutrition to match.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}So I got some pork liver today because it's supposed to be rich in iron.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}But I don't think it'll taste like much if I just boil it like usual...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}That's why I'm gonna try cooking a pork liver stir-fry. I already looked up how to make it. Think you can help out?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 1 25 25}I thought so too, but the recipe is actually pretty simple.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}...The only thing I can't handle is flipping the food in the pan. So I'm hoping you can manage that part.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Hey, don't be like that. I don't think I can flip the food in the pan myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Come on, call it a favor. This is supposed to be a really healthy dish.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}I've already cleaned the meat ahead of time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}All that's left is to cook the liver, then stir the chives and bean sprouts in, and that should be it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}I guess it was a good thing I took the time for all that prep.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}They say a boxing match is decided before the bell even rings. Maybe this is kind of the same thing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Oh, sorry. Obviously this wouldn't have been possible without your help.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}I've still got a lot to learn, but it's hard to make time for it with all my training and stuff.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}...Maybe if I attach weights to the pan when I'm flipping, I could kill two birds with one stone![n]{f 1 1}
